body:
closes #115 - This PR adds `Var.read_var` for a vector of NetCDF files and update `SimDir` to handle multiple outputs. 

For instance, the file directory could look like this:
```
global_diagnostics/
├── output_0001
│   ├── pfull_2.0d_inst.nc
│   ├── ts_1.0h_max.nc
│   └── ts_10d_average.nc
├── output_0002
│   ├── ts_1.0h_max.nc
│   └── ts_10d_average.nc
└── output_0003
    └── pfull_2.0d_inst.nc
```
The following code would work:
```julia
simulation_path = joinpath(simulation_path)
ts_max_var = get(simdir, short_name = "ts", reduction = "max", period = "1.0h")
pfull_var = get(simdir, short_name = "pfull", reduction = "2.0d", period = "inst")
```

When checking if it is okay to aggregate dimensions, `read_var` only checks for
- if the time dimension exists and the names of the time dimensions are all the same,
- if the start dates are the same,
- if the times are in increasing order if aggregated.
title: Add Var.read_var for a vector of NetCDF files and update SimDir to handle mulitiple outputs
